head.hi: The Acting Secretary of State to the Brazilian Chargé.

div.p: My Dear Mr. Chargé d’Affaires: I beg to inclose for your information a copy of an aide-mémoireSupra. which was handed to the chargé d’affaires ad interim of Chile on the 1st instant and a copy of an aide-mémoire,Supra. which was addressed to the diplomatic representatives of Ecuador and Peru at this capital on the same day, in reference to the mediation between Peru and Ecuador for the settlement of their differences in connection with the arbitration of their conflicting boundary claims.
These aides-mémoire have been communicated by cable to the American embassy at Petropolis, for communication to your Government.
I am, my dear Mr. de Lima, etc.,
